summary: There is no direct evidence supporting the reliability of the North Star Ambulatory Assessment (NSAA) score for evaluating disease progression in Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy among the reviewed sources. Clinical assessments focus instead on cardiac, pulmonary, and general health parameters without referencing standardized tools like NSAA.
